claim_text: A discovery-memory packet should be admitted only when it records ambiguity handling, artifact use, atomic fact checks, and a falsification route.
missingness: No live scientific dataset is bundled with this synthetic fixture.
revision_reason: Frontier benchmarks increasingly test workflow judgment, artifact interpretation, ambiguity handling, and data-backed evaluation rather than isolated recall.

ambiguity_decisions.decision: Classify this as research infrastructure instead of a biomedical claim.
ambiguity_decisions.why_chosen: The packet changes how hypotheses are admitted and scored, not what treatment or mechanism is true.
ambiguity_decisions.uncertainty_remaining: Thresholds need calibration against real curator disagreement.

artifact_grounding.used_for: Motivates explicit recording of ambiguity and consequential scientific judgments.
artifact_grounding.not_used_for: Not used as evidence that any biomedical hypothesis is correct.

artifact_grounding.used_for: Motivates atomic fact evaluation and dataset-backed response checks.
artifact_grounding.not_used_for: Not used to claim performance of Mirror Cartographer on single-cell tasks.

atomic_fact_checks.fact: Packet contains at least one explicit ambiguity decision.
atomic_fact_checks.contradiction_check: Reject if no alternatives or uncertainty are recorded.

atomic_fact_checks.fact: Packet separates artifact use from unsupported inference.
atomic_fact_checks.contradiction_check: Reject if used_for and not_used_for are missing.

falsification_route: If admitted packets without this gate produce equal or better curator agreement and fewer unsupported promotions, the gate should be revised or removed.
next_executable_action: Wire this validator before evidence-transition promotion and compare rejection reasons across 20 synthetic packets.

claim_text: The system should accept this generated hypothesis because it sounds plausible and references biology.
revision_reason: Fixture should fail because no ambiguity_decisions are present.

atomic_fact_checks.contradiction_check: Plausibility is not sufficient for admission.

atomic_fact_checks.fact: No validated artifact supports the claim.
atomic_fact_checks.contradiction_check: Reject if artifact support is absent.

falsification_route: If plausibility-only packets are accepted, downstream unsupported promotion rate should rise.
next_executable_action: Expect the validator to reject this fixture.

claim_text: A packet that uses private personal medical details or gives treatment advice should never enter public discovery memory.
revision_reason: Fixture should fail because privacy_status rejects public-memory admission.

ambiguity_decisions.decision: Reject packet from public discovery memory.
ambiguity_decisions.why_chosen: The safety boundary is more important than retaining sensitive specificity.
ambiguity_decisions.uncertainty_remaining: A private local-only vault could store a separate deidentified derivative.

artifact_grounding.not_used_for: Not used as personal medical or veterinary guidance.

atomic_fact_checks.contradiction_check: Reject regardless of other completeness fields.

atomic_fact_checks.fact: Public-safe conversion is required before admission.
atomic_fact_checks.contradiction_check: Reject if raw private context remains.

falsification_route: If any reject_private packet passes admission, the validator fails its core privacy requirement.
next_executable_action: Expect the validator to reject this fixture.
